pi_items.source: Confirmed via task description, verifier.py logic, and the standard Oracle HR schema definition.
Confirmed via task description and verifier.py logic.
Confirmed via task description and verifier.py logic which checks the redaction outcome for these four columns.
The task description explicitly states 'SALARY and COMMISSION_PCT are fully redacted'. The metadata claim omitted COMMISSION_PCT. The verifier.py also refers to 'Commission Redaction (Full)'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an Oracle Data Redaction policy on the standard HR.EMPLOYEES table to restrict data visibility for the QA_TESTER user. The data originates from the publicly available Oracle HR sample schema. Four columns must be redacted: SALARY and COMMISSION_PCT require FULL redaction (to appear as 0), while PHONE_NUMBER and EMAIL require PARTIAL redaction. The metadata claim for redaction types correctly identified the rules for three columns but omitted the FULL redaction requirement for the COMMISSION_PCT column.
